notes: Chunk 63 DONE (Template C, Tier B, 25 routes): Nordic (NO/SE/FI/DK) to Caribbean/LatAm x16 (Dominican Republic, Jamaica, Panama, Uruguay); Baltic (EE/LV/LT) to Lebanon x3; Caribbean/LatAm outbound to EU (BE/PT) x6 (DR, Jamaica, Panama, Uruguay). MGAP permits + Praziquantel for Uruguay. Panamanian Embassy auth for Panama. VSD permit + Plumb Point quarantine for Jamaica. FAVN titre test + 90-day wait for Caribbean-to-EU. Next: Chunk 64 (Template D, Tier B). Blog Day 25 after.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
